Created attachment 148173
LAM 4.7.1

[MAINTAINER] sysutils/ldap-account-manager: update to 4.7.1

LAM 4.7.1 bugfix release
Tue, 10/07/2014 - 10:38 — rgruber
Fixes the bug with blank page and "User tried to access entry of type ..." log message when DN suffix does not exactly match case in LDAP.
